use_codes.desc: DELIVERING A MEDICINAL AEROSOL FORMULATION USING CFC-FREE PROPELLANT 134A.

indications.text:
QVAR® is indicated in the maintenance treatment of asthma as prophylactic therapy in patients 5
years of age and older.
Important Limitations of Use:
 QVAR is NOT indicated for the relief of acute bronchospasm.

QVAR is indicated in the maintenance treatment of asthma as prophylactic therapy in patients 5
years of age and older. QVAR is also indicated for asthma patients who require systemic
corticosteroid administration, where adding QVAR may reduce or eliminate the need for the
systemic corticosteroids.
I...
